headline: Schwab Completes Forge Global Buyout, Boosts Private Markets Offering
summary: SCHW closes $660M all-cash Forge buyout, expanding private market access for retail, RIA and ultra-high-net-worth investors.

raw.headline: Schwab Completes Forge Global Buyout, Boosts Private Markets Offering

headline: Schwab Announces Its Institutional Investor Day
summary: WESTLAKE, Texas, March 04, 2026--The Charles Schwab Corporation announced that it has scheduled its Institutional Investor Day on Thursday, May 14th.

headline: Trump says ‘401(k)s are way up’ — but workers are tapping them at record rates
summary: President Donald Trump touted rising 401(k) balances in his State of the Union speech. Here's where those retirement accounts stand.

headline: Charles Schwab Acquisition Of Forge Global Expands Private Market Story
summary: Charles Schwab (NYSE:SCHW) has completed its acquisition of Forge Global Holdings. The deal brings Forge's private market investment platform under Schwab's umbrella. Clients are expected to gain access to pre-IPO investment opportunities through Forge's offerings. Charles Schwab is best known for its brokerage, advisory, and custody services, with a large footprint among individual investors and registered investment advisors. By bringing Forge Global into the group, Schwab is extending...
